title: Grappler (disambiguation)
content:
'''Grappler''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Grappler (Trident-class)|''Grappler'']]'''— a [[Trident-class assault ship|''Trident''-class assault ship]] used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Battle of Kamino]].
*'''[[Grappler (profession)|Grappler]]'''—someone who dismantled [[starship]]s in a [[salvage yard]].
*'''[[Time Grappler]]'''—a living time keeper on [[Ferrix]] who struck a [[beskar]] anvil with [[Hammer (tool)|hammers]].

==Legends==
*'''[[Grappler (starfighter)|Grappler]]'''— an organic ship created by [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]].
*'''[[Grappler (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Grappler'']]''', an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].
*[[Su-mil]], a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]] who used the warrior name "'''Grappler'''."

{{Disambig}}

{{Interlang
|ja=グラップラー
}}
